_publications._publicationTitle: Exploring transcriptional regulators Ref-1 and STAT3 as therapeutic targets in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumours.

_contextSnippet: Both dosing regimens were not overly toxic to the mice as body weights were maintained throughout the three weeks of dosing
details: Body weights were maintained throughout three weeks of dosing with both APX2009 and Napa, indicating treatments were not overly toxic
